name: lyftr-monorepo
//: npm workspaces root. `web` is deliberately NOT a workspace member yet — it keeps its own independent install + CI (cd web && npm ci). It migrates to @lyftr/shared in a later PR. See .claude/plans mobile-app plan.
//overrides: Force a single React across the workspace — RN 0.81's Fabric renderer crashes if the app and @lyftr/shared resolve different React copies (even different 19.x minors).
